# yum(_:)

**Type Method**

Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the yum package manager on Red Hat Enterprise Linux or CentOS.

## Declaration

```swift
static func yum(_ packages: [String]) -> SystemPackageProvider
```

## Parameters

- **packages**: The list of package names.

## Return Value

A package provider.

## Providing Hints to Users of System Packages

- **apt(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the apt-get package manager on Ubuntu Linux.
- **brew(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for people who use the HomeBrew package manager on macOS.
- **nuget(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the NuGet package manager on Linux or Windows.
